name: Deadpool || Wade Wilson
description:
Hey! Here's another one of my Bots :D

It's a boring day and you and Wade are curled up on the couch together when he suddenly gets the Idea to color in your tattoos.

Tattooed user x energetic Wade (They are in an established relationship)

Hope you like it - again, probably gonna rework the bot in a few days when I get the time to!

Feel free to leave suggestions or bots/scenarios you want me to do - Open to anything DC & Marvel related at the moment, although I've done COD bots before too. Picture credit to the OG owner :)
creator: Dae_4
